title: COVID RUSH
desc: An indie game mechanics exploration built in Unity, turning a chaotic supply run into a fast, satirical 3D dash. The avatars controlled by game AI can infect players, making the game more intense and difficult.

title: Unity Interactive Showcase
desc: An interactive 3D scene and animation environment exploration built with customized character modeling and custom audio scripts.

title: 瘋城 (Mad City)
desc: A major transdisciplinary interactive performance combining real-time technology, audio-visual environments, and physical performers.
institution: National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University (NYCU) & National Taiwan University of Arts (TNUA)

title: Trigonometric Ripple Composition
desc: In this composition, the 'ground'—represented by white sand and water patterns—is generated through trigonometric functions applied to screen coordinates. By introducing time-based variations, ripples extend and flow like organic ink painting with granular sand textures.

title: Shaders Trilogy: 恬 / 霽月 / 歸
desc: A trilogy of digital scenery exploring different philosophical states. '恬' inspired by Zhuge Liang's wisdom, '霽月' projecting emotions onto environments, and '歸' exploring the concept of homecoming through sunset hues.

title: GLSL Shaders Collection
desc: A collective series of graphics programming pieces exploring natural phenomena: 1. Waves (Voronoi/Metaballs/Ukiyo-e style), 2. Uncertain, 3. Breathing Light, 4. Reflection.

title: Girl with a Pearl Earring — 匯聚的思念
desc: Using Vermeer's masterpiece as a foundation, this work explores Brownian Motion and Random Walk algorithms to irregularly visualize the convergence of longing, remembrance, and digital dispersion.

title: Open LABs: 續。旭。不休
desc: Exhibited at NYCU Haoran Library 6th Floor. An atmospheric exploration contrasting environmental transitions between day and night environments.

title: Haru (はる / さくら)
desc: An atmospheric exploration created in Unreal Engine 5 investigating themes of fading memory. 'Who is calling? While Haru has withered away... through the pulse of sakura.' Powered by Niagara particle systems and custom material shaders.

title: The World Tree (世界樹)
desc: An immersive puzzle-solving application built in Unreal Engine 5. Players interact with open environments to nurture the World Tree, utilizing dynamic Niagara particle systems to symbolize environmental restoration and the continuation of life.

title: Brain Consciousness Space
desc: This work centers around the visualization of brain consciousness space, connecting Arduino with UE5 to create a visual effect that models rational chemical molecular movements (biological neural transmission) and emotional, abstract imaginative spaces. It uses simple sensors as interactive devices to realize human stimuli.

title: Zhi Xing Art Space Exhibition
desc: Exhibition and Opening Forum at National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University (Yang Ming Campus), College of Humanities and Social Sciences, Zhi Xing Art Space. Featuring the Immaculate Dance Theater Forum.

title: Idea Art Exploration
desc: A collaborative art piece blending conceptual ideation with creative programming.

title: Mobile Fish Interaction
desc: An interactive mobile application where an introduction panel for the fish will dynamically appear on the mobile device through user interaction.

title: Project 14 Visuals
desc: Interactive image gallery and media showcase.

title: Ghost in the Soil (Sketches & Materials)
desc: Sketches, materials and documentation for Ghost in the Soil project.
